about.title: Fullstack Depth.
about.description1: As a Senior Fullstack Developer with a specialized focus on Frontend Architecture, I've spent 13+ years bridging the gap between pixel-perfect design and scalable systems.
about.description2: My trajectory through Colegium and LingoQuesto has been defined by a single obsession: creating high-performance user experiences powered by robust, resilient backend foundations.
about.philosophyQuote: As a Frontend Focused Fullstack, I believe the interface is where engineering meets impact.
